overview: IntellMeet is an enterprise-grade video conferencing platform with a Matrix/Hacker dark aesthetic. It features WebRTC peer-to-peer video, collaborative whiteboard, screen recording with cloud upload, and full meeting history — all secured with Internet Identity authentication.
features: Internet Identity authentication with protected routes
WebRTC peer-to-peer video and audio grid
Live participant state: mute, camera, screen share, leave
Real-time collaborative HTML5 Canvas whiteboard with polling sync
Screen recording with MediaRecorder API and cloud upload
Screen sharing via browser display capture
Meeting history with date, duration, and participant count
Recording detail page with video playback and download
Matrix/Hacker dark aesthetic: emerald green and amber accents on deep charcoal
